series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes reports and memoranda created by the Executive Director and staff concerning the management or operations of the agency, including coaching, counseling, and performance-related documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format until no longer of current or of administrative value, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction. Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of current or of administrative value, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Archives
